item.title: A message from Guidance:
item.description: Students still working on their 40 volunteer hours are encouraged to check the Teams for approved opportunities or speak with a Guidance Counsellor for help getting started. RAPA is looking for several volunteers for their upcoming production in May. Grade 11 and 12s, the opportunity has been posted on your Teams pages. If there are any grade 9 and 10s interested, please see Ms. Timmins for more information.

item.title: A message from Chaplaincy:
item.description: If you're interested in reading at the Catholic Education Week Liturgy next Tuesday, or helping out with other aspects of the school-wide liturgy, please see Mr. Vonesch at the chaplaincy office

item.title: A message from Mrs. Longval:
item.description: Attention grade 9-12 students: students interested in trying out for the Co-Ed Junior or Senior Ultimate Teams are asked to SIGN UP outside Mr. Longval's office. All interested students are asked to attend a short meeting on Tuesday, April 28th at 10:45 a.m. in the weight room. Try-outs will begin this week as we prepare for the Prescott Russell tournament on Thursday, May 14th. Ultimate is an inclusive and fast-paced team sport that focuses on fitness, teamwork, communication, and sports-person-ship. No experience is necessary, so come out and give it a try. Please see Mrs. Longval if you have any questions.

item.title: A message from: Mrs. Longval:
item.description: Weight Room is OPEN this week at lunch on Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday AND Friday.

item.title: A message from 7/8 Athletics:
item.description: Reminder that today is the first Track & Field practice. We will meet in the gym at 2:15 and practice ends at 3:30. If you have any questions, see M. Décoste

item.title: A message from Mme Perron:
item.description: There will be a Europe Team Meeting Tuesday, April 28th at lunch. All travelers must attend. Please see mme perron today if you are unable to attend.

item.title: A message from Mr. Vonesch:
item.description: The 2027 Service team will be selling the goodies left over from friday's bake sale today at lunch at a discounted price, so please stop by to support!
